20260713-070255-wbd-001-cce9df: Invalid calibration: the additive feature task necessarily changed hard-coded P2P row/date counts, so no authorized correct solution could pass the frozen tests. Evidence retained; task redesigned as a repair before baseline.
20260713-070505-wbd-001-d7e1f4: Pre-baseline environment calibration: isolated workers could not invoke the pinned Playwright CLI; excluded so all compared baseline tasks use the same repaired runtime.
20260713-070550-wbd-002-374a47: Pre-baseline environment calibration: isolated workers could not invoke the pinned Playwright CLI; excluded so all compared baseline tasks use the same repaired runtime.
20260713-070720-wbd-003-494f45: Pre-baseline grader calibration: functionally correct conservative focus used an equivalent DOM expression rejected by the initial source-spelling assertion; browser P2P passed. Grader generalized before comparison.
20260713-071002-wbd-001-e0c6e0: Pre-baseline runtime calibration: grader launched owner Playwright while tests resolved the copied workspace package, causing a two-installation error. Grader now launches the workspace-pinned binary and any P2P failure is disqualifying.
20260713-071502-wbd-004-fcfa87: Runner calibration: variadic --image consumed the positional prompt, so Codex exited before a turn. Prompts now use explicit stdin and the visual task was rerun.
20260713-074453-wbd-002-eee9dd: Evaluator calibration: candidate satisfied every semantic/static/browser assertion, but standards-check incorrectly required type immediately after href. Attribute-order-independent checker and regression tests added before rerun.
20260713-075835-wbd-001-49804c: Runner calibration: structured-output service rejected unsupported uniqueItems before model execution. Schema reduced to the supported structural subset before rerun.
20260713-124103-claude-dynamic-wbd-003-e: Transient service failure: dynamic-arm config generator exhausted structured-output retries (error_max_structured_output_retries) before any fixture execution; no code or invariant changed. $0.3428 generator spend recorded against the dynamic arm; row relabeled claude-dynamic-screen-v1-excluded-setup (original label preserved in artifact result.json) so the frozen summarize/compare see one measured run per task-arm; command rerun once per plan.
20260713-132101-claude-dynamic-wbd-005-6: Transient service failure, second occurrence of the WBD-003-reviewed mode: dynamic-arm config generator exhausted structured-output retries (error_max_structured_output_retries, stop_reason tool_use) before any fixture execution. $0.4354 generator spend recorded against the dynamic arm; row relabeled claude-dynamic-screen-v1-excluded-setup; identical command retried once with no configuration, prompt, route, or grader change (held-out conditions preserved); a second generator failure on retry would have stopped the matrix.
20260713-132539-claude-dynamic-wbd-005-c: Second WBD-005 generator failure, retry of 20260713-132101: identical error_max_structured_output_retries ($0.3500 generator spend charged to the dynamic arm). Originally read as systematic; on user request to measure the dynamic arm, a third unchanged retry (20260713-134800-...-b3490c) succeeded with a compact 2-turn generation and passed WBD-005 at 100, confirming the failure is stochastic (successes finish in 2 turns; failures spiral to 6 turns and exceed schema maxLength caps), not a schema incompatibility. Row relabeled claude-dynamic-screen-v1-excluded-setup; no invariant changed.
